review: Meticulously researched and surprisingly hard to put down. The author weaves primary sources and personal narrative together seamlessly. I came in knowing little about the subject and left feeling like I'd lived through it. One of the best popular history books I've encountered.

examples.review: Absolute trash. Poorly written, boring plot, total waste of money.
It was fine. Not great, not terrible. A decent read to pass the time.
A masterpiece. Every page pulled me deeper in. One of the best books I've ever read.
